message:
fix(matrix): assign correct module for 9 orphaned GlibcCallThrough symbols

Fix 9 symbols that had no module field in support_matrix.json:
- vasprintf, vdprintf, vfprintf, vprintf, vsnprintf, vsprintf → stdio_abi
- glob64, globfree64, nftw64 → unistd_abi

All functions exist in their respective ABI modules; the matrix entries
were missing the module field from their initial bulk import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
